positive: A retro synthwave sunset over a grid-lined ocean. The sky features vibrant neon gradients (magenta, cyan, purple). Stylized palm trees and a low-poly sports car are visible in the foreground. Vaporwave aesthetic, 80s vaporwave art, highly saturated, vector illustration.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realistic texture, mud tones
